members.name: Kris Gadde
members.title: Founder & CEO, Allied Informatics, Inc.
members.bio: Kris Gadde is the Founder and Chief Executive Officer of Allied Informatics, Inc., a wellestablished IT services firm he has successfully led since its inception in 1991. Under his strategic leadership, the company has consistently earned a place among the Top 100 Indian American businesses for four consecutive years.

members.name: Suma Potini
members.title: CIO, Allied Informatics, Inc.
members.bio: Suma Potini, CIO of Allied Informatics, Inc., is a forward-thinking technology innovator and entrepreneur, committed to driving transformative change through cutting-edge solutions. With extensive experience in delivering large-scale IT projects, she excels at converting complex challenges into strategic innovations that significantly enhance efficiency and profitability.
